expected_behavior: Skill creates CONTEXT.md with glossary section and AI boundaries section; presents to user for approval before writing
notes: Foundation scenario — user defines all terms one-by-one

scenario: Brownfield project — CONTEXT.md exists but needs expansion
expected_behavior: Skill reads existing CONTEXT.md, proposes additions to glossary, asks user to approve each new term before merge
notes: Incremental alignment — must not silently overwrite existing definitions

scenario: Missing README — user has no domain vocabulary guidance
expected_behavior: Skill asks user to describe the project in their own words before attempting glossary extraction; documents AI boundaries explicitly
notes: High-friction scenario — requires patient questioning to surface implicit assumptions

scenario: User-provided term conflicts with existing glossary

input.existing_definition: User: a person who views content

expected_behavior: Skill detects mismatch, calls it out: 'Your glossary defines User as X, but you seem to mean Y — which is it?', waits for clarification
notes: Conflict resolution — must prevent silent redefinition
